name: handler throws string
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Bad: function(s, e) { throw "boom"; } })

name: handler throws Error object
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Bad: function(s, e) { throw new Error("something went wrong"); } })

name: handler throws TypeError
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Bad: function(s, e) { return e.data.foo.bar; } })

name: source definition error - fromStream expects string
source definition error - partitionBy expects function
source definition error - filterBy expects function
source definition error - unrecognized option
source: options({ bogus: true }); fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; } })

name: source definition error - invalid option value
source: options({ biState: "not a bool" }); fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; } })

error.description: Invalid value for option 'biState': expected a boolean

name: source definition error - $deleted in biState
source: options({ biState: true }); fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, $initShared: function() { return {}; }, $deleted: function(s) { return s; } })

error.description: Cannot handle deletes in bi-state projections

name: first event succeeds then second fails
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Good: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; }, Bad: function(s, e) { throw "fail"; } })

name: execution timeout
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Hang: function(s, e) { while(true) {} return s; } })

error.description: Projection script took too long to execute
Projection script took too long to compile

name: malformed event data - isJson true with invalid JSON
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Bad: function(s, e) { return e.data; } })

error.description: Event data is not valid JSON

name: NaN in state
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Bad: function(s, e) { s.value = NaN; return s; } })

name: transform throws
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { return s; } }).transformBy(function(s) { throw new Error("transform failed"); })
